catalog_search_index_jobs_pending_embedd.name: catalog_search_index_jobs_pending_embedding_document_id_idx
catalog_search_index_jobs_pending_embedd.where: "catalog_search_index_jobs"."status" in ('pending', 'running') and "catalog_search_index_jobs"."job_type" = 'refresh_embedding' and "catalog_search_index_jobs"."search_document_id" is not null
